data.title: Ace Hardware debuts Hey ARMA, its new AI assistant for in-store help
data.description: The AI assistant for store associates is being deployed through Ace Hardware's existing mobile platform, with the goal of improving customer service.

data.title: Watsco Q1 ecommerce outpaces overall sales
data.description: Ecommerce outperformed other areas of growth as Watsco looked ahead past Q1 to an anticipated Q2 closing for its Jackson Supply acquisition.

data.title: Amazon's AWS boosts revenue growth in Q1 milestone
data.description: AWS accounted for $37.6 billion of total Amazon revenue in Q1. That was just over 20% of Amazon sales in the quarter.

data.title: Ecommerce Trends: What Anthropic, OpenAI and Google are each doing in agentic commerce
data.description: Anthropic's latest experiment with Claude shows that it cares about ecommerce, even if OpenAI and Google have been building agentic commerce capabilities more publicly.

data.title: Vessi targets 'clean' product data to maximize AEO opportunities
data.description: Vessi's priority in terms of AEO is to make sure its products' direct data and catalog are "clean." In other words, that they're clear and optimized enough for LLMs to easily identify them. From there, AI platforms might then recommend Vessi products in their engines.
